basic_details.job_title: IIT Patna Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 3 Project Associate-2 Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 28-07-2026. In this article, you'll find the Project Associate-2 recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, email application procedure, and direct links to the official notification.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Upper age limit: 28 years for BTech/BSc/BCA candidates and 32 years for MTech/MSc/MCA candidates. Relaxations for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD as per GOI rules.
age_limit.details: Upper age limit: 28 years for BTech/BSc/BCA candidates. Upper age limit: 32 years for MTech/MSc/MCA candidates. Relaxations for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD as per GOI rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/M.Tech degree in Computer Science/ Information Technology/ Software Engineering/ Electronics Engineering/ Electrical Engineering/ AI/DS or related fields with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% of marks. Must have qualified GATE in CS/DA not older than 04 years from the last date of submission of application / NET qualification. GATE score is waived for candidates with Bachelor's Degree in Engineering from CFTIs with CGPA of 8.0 and above.
qualification.details: B.Tech/M.Tech degree in Computer Science/ Information Technology/ Software Engineering/ Electronics Engineering/ Electrical Engineering/ AI/DS or related fields with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% of marks. Must have qualified GATE in CS/DA not older than 04 years from the last date of submission of application / NET qualification. GATE score is waived for candidates with Bachelor's Degree in Engineering from the Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with CGPA of 8.0 and above (out of 10). Working/research experience in the field of generative AI and a good knowledge of python will be given preference.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Patna Project Associate-2 Job 2026 Notification PDF

GATE score is waived for candidates with Bachelor's Degree in Engineering from the Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with CGPA of 8.0 and above (out of 10). content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Project Associate-2 Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Project Associate-2 Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Patna Project Associate-2 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 28th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate-2 position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech/M.Tech degree in Computer Science, IT, Software Engineering, Electronics, Electrical Engineering, AI/DS, or related fields with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% marks, and have qualified GATE/NET.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxations are provided for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD candidates as per the Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-2 post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of INR 42000/- per month plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be sent via email to the specified address. You also need to fill out a Google form as part of the application process.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Project Associate-2 position at IIT Patna.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any preference for specific experience?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with working/research experience in generative AI and good knowledge of Python will be given preference.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written test and/or an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is via email. Candidates need to send their resume and application to the provided email ID and fill out a Google form.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT Patna located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Patna is located in Patna, Bihar, with the pincode 801106.
